SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AddNewOneToManyEndpointRelation
Represents a relation that generates a POST endpoint to add a new entity to a One-to-Many association.
ClassNameUtils
 
ComparisonMatchMode
 
ControllerGenerator
Generator for Spring REST controllers.
EndpointRelation
Abstract base class for defining extra endpoints related to entity associations or methods.
EndpointRelationFactory
 
EndpointRelationResolver
Factory for resolving EndpointRelations from entity elements.
FilterField
Indicates that the annotated field should be used as a filter field.
FilterFieldModel
 
FilterFieldModelFactory
 
FilterGenerator
Generator for Spring Data JPA filter interfaces.
ForgeController<E,ID,R,S>
Abstract base implementation of controller that delegates to a ForgeService.
ForgePersistenceHook<E>
Interface for persistence hooks that can be executed before and after CRUD operations.
ForgeProcessor
Annotation processor for generating JPA repositories, services, and REST controllers.
ForgeService<E,ID,R>
Abstract base class for generated services.
GetOrCreate
Indicates that the annotated entity should have a "get or create" operation generated.
HasName
Interface for entities that have a name property.
HasNameRepository<E>
Fragment interface for repositories of entities implementing HasName.
HasToPredicate
 
HttpStatusValue
 
IterableMatchMode
 
JpaEntityModel
Represents a JPA entity model with information needed for code generation.
JpaEntityModelFactory
Factory for creating and caching JpaEntityModel instances.
JpaEntityPackageNames
Package names for generated classes related to a JPA entity.
JpaEntityRequirements
Requirements and configuration flags for a JPA entity model.
JpaId
Represents the ID of a JPA entity.
LinkExistingManyToManyEndpointRelation
Represents a relation that generates a PUT endpoint to link an existing entity to a Many-to-Many association.
LinkExistingManyToOneEndpointRelation
 
LoggingUtils
Utility for logging diagnostic messages during annotation processing.
ManyToManyEndpointRelationFactory
 
ManyToOneEndpointRelation
Base class for Many-to-One endpoint relations.
ManyToOneEndpointRelationFactory
 
OneToManyEndpointRelation
Base class for One-to-Many endpoint relations.
OneToManyEndpointRelationFactory
 
OneToOneEndpointRelationFactory
 
RangeBoundMode
 
ReadManyToManyEndpointRelation
Represents a relation that generates a GET endpoint to read a Many-to-Many associated entity.
ReadManyToOneEndpointRelation
Represents a relation that generates a GET endpoint to read a Many-to-One associated entity.
ReadOneToManyEndpointRelation
 
ReadOneToOneEndpointRelation
Represents a relation that generates a GET endpoint to read a One-to-One associated entity.
RepositoryGenerator
Generator for Spring Data JPA repositories.
ServiceGenerator
Generator for Spring services.
ServiceRepositoryEndpointRelation
Base class for endpoint relations that involve both Service and Repository layers.
SpringForgeConfig
Configuration for Spring Forge, loaded from springforge.yml or processing options.
StringMatchMode
 
StringUtils
Utility for string manipulations.
UnlinkManyToManyEndpointRelation
Represents a relation that generates a DELETE endpoint to remove (unlink) an entity from a Many-to-Many association.
UnlinkManyToOneEndpointRelation
 
UnlinkOneToManyEndpointRelation
Represents a relation that generates a DELETE endpoint to remove an entity from a OneToMany association.
UnlinkOneToOneEndpointRelation
Represents a relation that generates a DELETE endpoint to remove (unlink) an entity from a One-to-One association.
WithEndpoints
Configures generation of multiple endpoints for a collection association field.
WithGetEndpoint
Indicates that the annotated method should be exposed as a GET endpoint.
WithJpaRepository
Triggers the generation of a Spring Data JPA repository for the annotated entity.
WithRestController
Triggers the generation of a Spring REST controller and JPA repository for the annotated entity.
WithService
Triggers the generation of a service class and JPA repository for the annotated entity.
